sigWerErrors.reason: '¿Habrá' (Will there be) vs '¿Hay' (Is there) changes the tense but the intent of the question remains the same; the meaning is preserved in context.
Adding 'le' (to him/her/it) clarifies the recipient but does not change the overall meaning of the sentence.
